message:
wip(convoy): add ConvoyConfig with NotifyOnComplete to TownSettings

Partial implementation of gt-e1ar4 (convoy completion notifications).
Added ConvoyConfig struct and Convoy field to TownSettings. Still needed:
- gt config set/get commands for convoy.notify_on_complete
- Nudge Mayor session in notifyConvoyCompletion when enabled

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
